characters.name: Blythe Baxter
characters.description: Blythe Baxter'is a girl who is the main human character in the series. She is based on the "Blythe" dolls that have been tied in with LPS toys. She is a good sketcher and her sketches become part of her portfolio for "Blythe Style" fashion for pets. When she moved to the new apartment she discovers a secret entrance to the Littlest Pet Shop below via adumbwaiter. Also more surprising is her ability to talk to pets which takes her by surprise when the pets in the shop start talking to her. Name Blythe Baxter

characters.name: Brittany Biskit
characters.description: Brittany Biskitis the main antagonist on the show. Her father owns the rival pet shop.

characters.name: Gail Trent
characters.description: Gail Trentis a spaniel that is the sister of Zoe. She is pink with purple hair and has a crystal collar. She first appeared in  the episodeGailbreak!. After thinking she was trapped at the largest ever pet shop, they discover that "Gail" is another dog called Tootsie. The real gail says zoe always confuses her.

characters.name: Minka Mark
characters.description: Minka Markis a rambunctious Pink Monkey who is one of the main seven littlest pet shop pets. Her color schemehas been compared of Cheerilee and Pinkie Pie from my Little Pony. She is a fan of art but only for play and an attempt to make a career out her art inBad Hair Daybackfired but she did show her talent by temporally "fixing" Zoe's hair.

characters.name: Mrs. Twombly
characters.description: Mrs. Twombly is the owner ofLittlest Pet Shop (location). She has gray hair with lighter gray streaks and turquoise-colored eyes and glasses. She is also known as "Lake Winnie Hawhaw Sass Master Champion" or "The Sass Master" as a shorter title.

characters.name: Roger Baxter
characters.description: Roger Baxters the father ofBlythe Baxter. He is employed as pilot. The first episode begins with him moving to an apartment above the Littlest Pet Shop in "Downtown City" with Blythe after a work promotion. His car driving skills however is not as good as his piloting as depicted with him getting lost and also doing some crazy maneuvers on the roads.

characters.name: Russell Ferguson
characters.description: Russel Fergusonis an orange Hedgehog (sometimes confused as a porcupine) who is one the main seven littlest pet shop pets. He is the first of the pets to speak to Blythe.

characters.name: Whittany Biskit
characters.description: Whittany Biskitis the main antagonist on the show. Her father owns the rival pet shop.

characters.name: Zoe Trent
characters.description: Zoe Trentis a one of the main seven animals that reside at Littlest Pet shop day camp. Her main talents are singing and attending grooming shows. She is voiced by Nicole Oliver and her singing is voiced by Kylee Epp. Zoe is a female purple Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with light blue eyes, who is a singer. A born diva, she strives to achieve her goal as being the greatest entertainer, though she can sometimes be quite dramatic, snobbish, leader and a little rude towards others but she cares for everyone very much and is very willing to go out of her comfort zone to be there for them. Her owners are couple John (voiced by Peter New) and Clarissa Trent (voiced by Tabitha St. Germain). Zoe is the older sister of Gail Trent (voiced by Tabitha St. Germain) In "Trading Places" Zoe says she has a crush on a dog named Digby and once fell in love with a street mime in Paris named Philippe. Name Zoe Trent
